title: March 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 23''' is the 82nd day of the year (83rd in leap years). There are 283 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Michael Sorich]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Rafael Ferrer]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Reggie Watts]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Keri Russell]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars]]:'' "[[While Giants Mark Time]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 92|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 92]] published.
*[[2005]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 23]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2005 – [[Obsession 4|''Obsession'' 4]] published.
*2005 – [[Republic 74|''Republic'' 74]] published.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith 2]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Disney Junior]] launched.
*[[2016]] – "[[The Mystery of Chopper Base]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 16|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 16]] published in the United Kingdom.
*2016 – [[Obi-Wan and Anakin 3|''Obi-Wan and Anakin'' 3]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Debbie Lee Carrington]] dies.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle (TPB)|''Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Omnibus Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 5]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[TIE Fighters]]'' published
*[[2022]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 21|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 21]] published.
*2022 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 19|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 19]] published.
*[[2025]] – "[[Unmasked]]" and "[[Just Like Wes / Raxlo to the Rescue]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
<noinclude>
